== Notes for [[Item:Q103142|Q103142]] ==

http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/591/1/1133-9284_n097_p241-254.pdf (page 246) says Teresa Ruiz was the daughter of Sancho Ruiz and Isabel Ruiz from Medina del Campo, Valladolid.

Sancho Ruiz must be Sancho Ruiz de Villena since in http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45697 page 7 it says that Alvar Rodriguez de Maluenda, son of Juan Garces de Maluenda and Maria Nunez de Cartagena was married to a ...de Villena

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003265432515

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
